experiment: T1 iter38 — FoG events + balance geometry chain-step-routed POST-K=500

formula.experiment: T1 iter38 — FoG event stats + balance geometry routed POST-K=500 for items 11+13
formula.slot: B of T1 Glass-Ceiling Push 2026-05-10 (master prereg results/preregistration_t1_ceiling_push_20260510_134829.json, FWER n=4)

cohort.filter: PD with full items 9-14, 15, 18 (matches iter34 cohort)

stage2.ensemble_method: average chain-output across 3 bases per fold per seed

fog_balance_routing.item_11_fog: fog_event_rate + fog_event_duration_mean + fog_event_duration_std appended to chain step where target item id == 11
fog_balance_routing.item_13_balance: bal_lumbar_pitch_mean + bal_lumbar_pitch_excur + bal_lumbar_roll_mean + bal_xiphoid_pitch_mean + bal_forehead_pitch_mean appended to chain step where target item id == 13
fog_balance_routing.K500_pool_unchanged: V2 only; FoG+bal features never enter K=500 ranking

slot_b_cache.leakage_argument: FoG events: bandpass envelope thresholding on Lumbar Acc-mag in 3-8 Hz band, no labels. Balance geometry: median pitch/roll on Balance task Euler angles, no labels.

lockbox_rules: ONE pre-registered config. ONE LOOCV run. SLOT B of FWER n=4 family.
Bonferroni gates: frac>0 ≥ 0.9875 vs iter12-honest-n93 AND vs iter34-n93.
